name: Graham Crust
recipeIngredient: 1 cup crushed SnackWell's Cinnamon Graham Crackers, Fat Free (approximately 1 box)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the crushed SnackWell's graham crackers on a sheet of wax paper.
2. Roll over the crackers with a rolling pin until they are evenly crushed.
3. Mix in the granulated sugar and Liquid Butter Buds until the mixture is moistened and clings together when pressed.
4. Press the mixture into a Pam-coated pan, ensuring an even layer throughout.
This recipe provides a basic graham cracker crust using SnackWell's Cinnamon Graham Crackers, which are low in fat. The addition of sugar and Liquid Butter Buds ensures that the mixture is moist enough to hold together when pressed into the pan.
